public class

InputManager

extends ManagerBase
java.lang.Object
   ↳ com.autolink.manager.ManagerBase
     ↳ com.autolink.manager.input.InputManager

Class Overview

方控硬按键服务接口

Summary

Nested Classes
interface InputManager.onEventListener 长按键状态的回调 
interface InputManager.onKeyListener 按键状态的回调 
Constants
int ACTION_PRESS 按下事件
int ACTION_RELEASE 松开事件
int ATTRIBUTE_LONG_PRESS 长按事件
int ATTRIBUTE_SHORT_PRESS 短按事件
int CALL_STATE_ACTIVE
int CALL_STATE_ALERTING
int CALL_STATE_DIALING
int CALL_STATE_HELD
int CALL_STATE_HELD_BY_RESPONSE_AND_HOLD
int CALL_STATE_IDLE
int CALL_STATE_INCOMING
int CALL_STATE_TERMINATED
int CALL_STATE_WAITING
int CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION_AVM 自定义按键-AVM
int CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION_DRIVE_MODE 自定义按键-驾驶模式切换（默认）
int CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION_EMERGENCY_RECORD 自定义按键-DVR车外紧急录制（行车记录仪功能）
int CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION_MUSIC_IDENTIFY 自定义按键-听歌识曲
int CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION_NONE 自定义按键-无(北汽项目不适用)
int CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION_SCREENSHOT 自定义按键-截屏
int KEYCODE_HUD_DOWN HUD显示高度向下调节
int KEYCODE_HUD_LEFT HUD亮度降低
int KEYCODE_HUD_RIGHT HUD亮度提高
int KEYCODE_HUD_UP HUD显示高度向上调节
int KEYCODE_MEDIA_SWITCH 切换多媒体音源
int KEYCODE_MIRROR_DOWN 后视镜角度向下调节
int KEYCODE_MIRROR_LEFT 后视镜角度向前调节
int KEYCODE_MIRROR_RIGHT 后视镜角度向后调节
int KEYCODE_MIRROR_UP 后视镜角度向上调节
int SCENE_CALL
int SCENE_HUD
int SCENE_MIRROR 后视镜场景
int SCENE_NONE 默认场景
int SCENE_OFF
int SCENE_ON

Constants

public static final int ACTION_PRESS

按下事件

Constant Value: 0 (0x00000000)

public static final int ACTION_RELEASE

松开事件

Constant Value: 1 (0x00000001)

public static final int ATTRIBUTE_LONG_PRESS

长按事件

Constant Value: 1 (0x00000001)

public static final int ATTRIBUTE_SHORT_PRESS

短按事件

Constant Value: 0 (0x00000000)

public static final int CALL_STATE_ACTIVE

Constant Value: 0 (0x00000000)

public static final int CALL_STATE_ALERTING

Constant Value: 3 (0x00000003)

public static final int CALL_STATE_DIALING

Constant Value: 2 (0x00000002)

public static final int CALL_STATE_HELD

Constant Value: 1 (0x00000001)

public static final int CALL_STATE_HELD_BY_RESPONSE_AND_HOLD

Constant Value: 6 (0x00000006)

public static final int CALL_STATE_IDLE

Constant Value: 8 (0x00000008)

public static final int CALL_STATE_INCOMING

Constant Value: 4 (0x00000004)

public static final int CALL_STATE_TERMINATED

Constant Value: 7 (0x00000007)

public static final int CALL_STATE_WAITING

Constant Value: 5 (0x00000005)

public static final int CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION_AVM

自定义按键-AVM

Constant Value: 4 (0x00000004)

public static final int CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION_DRIVE_MODE

自定义按键-驾驶模式切换（默认）

Constant Value: 1 (0x00000001)

public static final int CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION_EMERGENCY_RECORD

自定义按键-DVR车外紧急录制（行车记录仪功能）

Constant Value: 5 (0x00000005)

public static final int CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION_MUSIC_IDENTIFY

自定义按键-听歌识曲

Constant Value: 2 (0x00000002)

public static final int CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION_NONE

自定义按键-无(北汽项目不适用)

Constant Value: 0 (0x00000000)

public static final int CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION_SCREENSHOT

自定义按键-截屏

Constant Value: 3 (0x00000003)

public static final int KEYCODE_HUD_DOWN

HUD显示高度向下调节

Constant Value: 502 (0x000001f6)

public static final int KEYCODE_HUD_LEFT

HUD亮度降低

Constant Value: 503 (0x000001f7)

public static final int KEYCODE_HUD_RIGHT

HUD亮度提高

Constant Value: 504 (0x000001f8)

public static final int KEYCODE_HUD_UP

HUD显示高度向上调节

Constant Value: 501 (0x000001f5)

public static final int KEYCODE_MEDIA_SWITCH

切换多媒体音源

Constant Value: 509 (0x000001fd)

public static final int KEYCODE_MIRROR_DOWN

后视镜角度向下调节

Constant Value: 506 (0x000001fa)

public static final int KEYCODE_MIRROR_LEFT

后视镜角度向前调节

Constant Value: 507 (0x000001fb)

public static final int KEYCODE_MIRROR_RIGHT

后视镜角度向后调节

Constant Value: 508 (0x000001fc)

public static final int KEYCODE_MIRROR_UP

后视镜角度向上调节

Constant Value: 505 (0x000001f9)

public static final int SCENE_CALL

Constant Value: 5 (0x00000005)

public static final int SCENE_HUD

Constant Value: 2 (0x00000002)

public static final int SCENE_MIRROR

后视镜场景

Constant Value: 1 (0x00000001)

public static final int SCENE_NONE

默认场景

Constant Value: 0 (0x00000000)

public static final int SCENE_OFF

Constant Value: 99 (0x00000063)

public static final int SCENE_ON

Constant Value: 100 (0x00000064)

Protected Constructors

protected InputManager (ApiImp autolink, String serviceName)

Parameters
autolink ApiImp
serviceName String

Public Methods

public void addEventListener (int[] keyCodes, InputManager.onEventListener listener)

注册长按键状态的回调

Parameters
keyCodes int: keycode键值, 参考 KEYCODE_*
listener InputManager.onEventListener: 长按键状态的回调

public void addKeyListener (int[] keyCodes, InputManager.onKeyListener listener)

注册按键状态的回调

Parameters
keyCodes int: keycode键值, 参考 KEYCODE_*
listener InputManager.onKeyListener: 按键状态的回调

public int getCustomKeyFunction ()

获取自定义按键当前功能

Returns
int #CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION 自定义按键功能

public void removeEventListener (InputManager.onEventListener listener)

移除长按键状态的回调

Parameters
listener InputManager.onEventListener: 长按键状态的回调

public void removeKeyListener (InputManager.onKeyListener listener)

移除按键状态的回调

Parameters
listener InputManager.onKeyListener: 按键状态的回调

public boolean setCustomKeyFunction (int value)

设置自定义按键功能

Parameters
value int: 功能 can be CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION_DRIVE_MODE, CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION_MUSIC_IDENTIFY, CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION_SCREENSHOT, CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION_AVM, CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION_EMERGENCY_RECORD
Returns
boolean 设置自定义按键功能结果 true:设置成功

public boolean setMultifunctionScene (int scene)

设置按键场景模式

Parameters
scene int: 场景模式，can be SCENE_NONE, SCENE_MIRROR, SCENE_HUD,
Returns
boolean 设置按键场景模式结果 true:设置成功

public boolean setMultifunctionScene (int scene, int mSwitch)

Parameters
scene int
mSwitch int
Returns
boolean
